title: Marketplace Manager - Rapido - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Rapido - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Rapido invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Rapido:
Rapido is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rapido!
